---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement to ferrolens
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

What workflow problem are you trying to solve?

## Proposed change

Describe the feature you want.

## Why this would help

Explain the benefit for real ferrolens users.

## Scope notes

If you already know, say whether this should be:

- a small UX improvement
- a new file-format capability
- a performance improvement
- a release/documentation improvement

## Additional context

Examples, screenshots, sample files, or references are welcome.
